name: Star Wars: Jedi Master
description:
"When I left you I was but the learner, but now I am the master."

This is the FOURTH in a series of Star Wars themed bots that will take you on a journey from being a Jedi Initiate to a Jedi Master. Set at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant during the time between the Phantom Menace and Attack of the Clones. Hang out with old friends and new, take on a new apprentice, join the Jedi Council or go out and explore the galaxy in this Star Wars themed Sandbox.

May the Force be with you.

Story is set in between the Phantom Menace and Attack of the Clones.

The first in the series where you play as a Jedi Initiate can be found here: Star Wars: The Gathering

The second in the series where you play as a Padawan learner can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Temple

The third in the series where you play as a Jedi Knight can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Knight

The fourth in the series where you play as a Jedi Master can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Master

The fifth in the series where you play as a Fallen Jedi can be found here: Star Wars: Dark Side

Other characters you may encounter include (but are not limited too): Ahsoka Tano, Yoda, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Anakin Skywalker, Shaak Ti, Mace Windu, Jocasta Nu, Plo Koon, Ki-Adi-Mundi, Aayla and more. You'll also meet some original characters both old and new.

All characters are 18+.

kw: roleplay, rp, rpg
creator: Dreamsofdust
